# Spec Kit Acceptance Gate MCP

Paid remote MCP for spec driven development acceptance gate MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://speckitacceptance.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://speckitacceptance.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://speckitacceptance.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/spec-kit-acceptance-gate-mcp

Use case: spec driven development acceptance gate MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_spec_acceptance, map_diff_to_requirements, verify_acceptance_evidence, issue_acceptance_receipt, export_acceptance_audit
